calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
TENTATIVE RULING: Continued to 8/26/26. (No earlier availability.)

Aside from obtaining an order confirming who the heirs are, other issues posted in the tentative ruling for the hearing on 11/10/25 have not yet been addressed:
(1) No proof of service of notice of the amendment has been filed. The ONLY PROPER FORM OF NOTICE is the mandatory Judicial Council form Notice of Hearing, on the reverse side of which is the proof of service that should be completed.
(2) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.]
(3) Notice is defective if mailed before the filing of the pleading requiring notice. [LRSF 14.14 A.]
(4) The address for Lori Barrows Hoag shown in paragraph 2 of the amendment is not the address to which notice was mailed to her on 8/14/25 (and also not the address shown on the inappropriate proof of service attached to the amendment filed on10/17/25).
(5) Please file proof of the sale of the firearms by the dealers (receipt of the sale proceeds by the estate).
(6) The proposed distribution is the same as in the petition - not the one reflecting the corrected statutory compensation.
Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 8/12/26.
Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE
